query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'quick_notes' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 9NNjvn7NV7enobv.7ea640e70a8c --database YMZow7uQxpBVyBGbmbpvvd --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'quick_notes' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_DEFAULT
id	int	NO	NULL
text	text	NO	NULL
project_id	int	YES	NULL
